title: dia #1223
definition:
1) through
    1a) of place
        1a1) with
        1a2) in
    1b) of time
        1b1) throughout
        1b2) during
    1c) of means
        1c1) by
        1c2) by the means of
 2) through
    2a) the ground or reason by which something is or is not done
        2a1) by reason of
        2a2) on account of
        2a3) because of for this reason
        2a4) therefore
        2a5) on this account
